name: No Password Rule Added to Sudoers File
notes:
This rule detects an unusual sudo rule added in the system, which requires no password for a user. 

Note: Edit the rule to replace "authorized_username" to authorized administrators of the system.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Policy Added
when the event matches Target Username (custom) is not any of authorized_users
when the event matches Rule Details (custom) contains any of NOPASSWD
TD_list: APPLY No Password Rule Added to Sudoers File on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Policy Added
AND when the event matches Target Username (custom) is not any of authorized_users
AND when the event matches Rule Details (custom) contains any of NOPASSWD
RED_list: Event name: No Password Rule Added to Sudoers File
Event description: Detects an unusual sudo rule added in the system, which requires no password for any user.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Target Username (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
